title: paronychia capitata subsp. nivea
intro: Paronychia capitata subsp. nivea, also known as the White Buttonweed or White Paronychia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Four o' clock family (Nyctaginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Paronychia capitata subsp. nivea include its ability to treat skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and wounds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
